properties.name: razorpay.key_id
properties.description: Razorpay API key id (PaymentServiceImpl).

properties.name: razorpay.key_secret
properties.description: Razorpay API key secret. Prefer environment variables in production.

properties.name: razorpay.webhook_secret
properties.description: Razorpay webhook signing secret for POST /payments/webhook (PaymentServiceImpl).

properties.name: razorpay.mode
properties.description: Active Razorpay mode selector: test or live (RazorpayProperties).

properties.name: razorpay.live.key_id
properties.description: Razorpay live mode key id (RazorpayProperties).

properties.name: razorpay.live.key_secret
properties.description: Razorpay live mode key secret (RazorpayProperties).

properties.name: razorpay.test.key_id
properties.description: Razorpay test mode key id (RazorpayProperties).

properties.name: razorpay.test.key_secret
properties.description: Razorpay test mode key secret (RazorpayProperties).

properties.name: auth.test-login.enabled
properties.description: Enable fixed OTP fast-path for one configured test phone (AuthServiceImpl).

properties.name: auth.test-login.phone
properties.description: Phone number allowed to use test-login OTP fast-path (AuthServiceImpl).

properties.name: auth.test-login.otp
properties.description: Static OTP used for test-login phone when enabled (AuthServiceImpl).

properties.name: auth.otp.expose-in-response
properties.description: Whether generated OTP is echoed in API response for QA flows (AuthServiceImpl).

properties.name: payments.test-bypass.enabled
properties.description: Enable payment bypass for whitelisted phones during QA/review (PaymentServiceImpl).

properties.name: payments.test-bypass.phones
properties.description: Comma-separated phone numbers allowed to bypass real Razorpay (PaymentServiceImpl).

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC secret for signing JWTs (JwtUtil).

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT validity duration (supports units like 24h, 30m; plain numeric values are treated as milliseconds).

properties.name: youdash.outstation.price-per-km
properties.description: Fallback price per km for outstation quotes when vehicle is not selected. Prefer kebab-case in application.properties; camelCase is an accepted alias.

properties.name: youdash.outstation.pricePerKm
properties.description: Alias of youdash.outstation.price-per-km (relaxed binding).

properties.name: youdash.maps.distance.api-key
properties.description: Google Maps / Distance Matrix API key; when empty, haversine is used (DistanceServiceImpl).

properties.name: notification.dedup.ttl-ms
properties.description: Deduplication window for identical notifications in ms (NotificationDedupService).

properties.name: notification.admin.fcm.tokens
properties.description: Comma-separated FCM tokens for admin/ops devices (NotificationService).

properties.name: firebase.user.service-account.path
properties.description: Filesystem path to the User app Firebase Admin SDK JSON. Enables user FCM when set and file exists (FirebaseConfig). Override via env FIREBASE_USER_SA_PATH.

properties.name: firebase.rider.service-account.path
properties.description: Filesystem path to the Rider app Firebase Admin SDK JSON. Enables rider FCM when set and file exists (FirebaseConfig). Override via env FIREBASE_RIDER_SA_PATH.

properties.name: incity.payment-reminder.remaining-seconds-min
properties.description: Lower bound (exclusive) of seconds-until-payment-due for PAYMENT_PENDING_REMINDER (IncityPaymentReminderScheduler).

properties.name: incity.payment-reminder.remaining-seconds-max
properties.description: Upper bound (inclusive) of seconds-until-payment-due for PAYMENT_PENDING_REMINDER (IncityPaymentReminderScheduler).

properties.name: incity.payment-reminder.scheduler-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay between scheduler runs for payment reminders (IncityPaymentReminderScheduler).

properties.name: openapi.server.url
properties.description: Primary OpenAPI server URL shown in Swagger UI (SwaggerConfig).

properties.name: openapi.server.local-url
properties.description: Local OpenAPI server URL shown in Swagger UI (SwaggerConfig).

properties.name: youdash.tracking.min-update-interval-ms
properties.description: Minimum interval between rider location updates in ms; faster updates are rate-limited (TrackingService).

properties.name: youdash.tracking.city-speed-kmh
properties.description: Average city speed used for fallback ETA estimation in km/h (TrackingService).

properties.name: youdash.tracking.near-destination-radius-m
properties.description: Radius in meters that marks rider as near destination (TrackingService).

properties.name: youdash.tracking.at-destination-radius-m
properties.description: Radius in meters that marks rider as arrived at destination (TrackingService).
